content: Thank you for your suggestion. I'm so sorry for the late reply. <:dishes:1356083313063759922>  I'll write it down, but I personally think the chances of it being revised are slim...<:Helot_slack_off:1459092159465521184> because it means a major overhaul of resource acquisition and distribution within the game.
✅「Answered」Make Interlude stages for all Covenant sets (or give more ways to get Exchange currency)
